GRIT Program 120.2026-03-23:
WARM UP
2 alternating sets of:
A1. Dual Kettlebell Wall Sit 2 x 60 Seconds
— 10 eah side
Rest as needed
A2. Monster Walk 2 x 10 Meters
— Each side
Rest as needed
A3. Copenhagen Plank 2 x 20 Seconds
Rest as needed
ACTIVATION
3 alternating sets of:
B1. Knee Jump To Broad Jump 3 x 3 Meters
— 10 eah side
— Máxima distancia de salto y mínimo tiempo de contacto.
Rest as needed
B2. Sots Press 3 x 6
— Clean grip
Rest as needed
C. WEIGHTLIFTING
Power Clean + Hang Squat Clean + Front Squat + Split Jerk 3 x 1
@ 30-40 %1RM
— 1 rep of each movement
— Split: 1" pause
Rest as needed
D. BUILD A HEAVY
Within 15 min — Rest as needed
Squat Clean + Front Squat + Split Jerk 1 Rep
@ Max kg
— 1 rep of each movement
Rest as needed
E. WEIGHTLIFTING
At minute 16 do;
Squat Clean & Split Jerk 10 x 1
— Start with an 80% and finish 96% of the previous complex.
— - Sin fallos. Tenemos que terminar con la sensación que entra más peso.
— - Para construir el heavy complex no es necesario hacer el complex entero.
— - Recomendamos hacer una serie de 1 Squat Clean + 1 Split Jerk aproximadamente cada 60-90" hasta llegar al peso donde probaremos el complex. Máximo 2 intentos de heavy complex.
— - No mistakes. We need to eliminate the feeling that more weight is being added.
— - To build up to the heavy complex, it’s not necessary to perform the entire complex.
— - We recommend doing a set of 1 squat clean + 1 split jerk approximately every 60–90 seconds until you reach the weight at which you’ll attempt the complex. Maximum of 2 attempts at the heavy complex.
STRENGTH
5 alternating sets of:
One movement every 90 seconds
F1. Deadstop Deficit Deadlift 5 x 5 (7 cm deficit)
— Start 60 % and add weight Every Round. Finish With Rir 3-2
F2. Barbell Bench Press 5 x 8 (Tempo: 31X0)
— Start 50 % An add weight Every Round. Finish With Rir 2-1
Rest as needed
G. METCON
5 Rounds for Time — Rest 2:30 between rounds
5 Rounds For Time of Hang Squat Cleans, Wall Ball Shots, Box Jump Overs, and more
  • 6 Hang Squat Clean @ 70/48 kg
  • 18 Wall Ball Shots @ 12/9 kg
  • 12 Box Jump Over
  • 6 Dual Dumbbell Deadlift @ 40/30 kg
  • 18 cal Row
— - Subtract 2 reps of wall balls and 2 cals of row every round.
— - La propuesta de entrenamiento donde vamos bajando repeticiones en cada round nos tiene que permitir menores pérdidas de intensidad a lo largo de las series.
— - El objetivo es ir unbroken y con transiciones rápidas.
— - This workout plan, in which we reduce the number of repetitions in each round, should help minimize any loss of intensity throughout the sets.
— - The goal is to complete the workout without stopping and with quick transitions.
— - NIVEL RX -
— 6 Hang Squat Clean 60/40
— 15 Wall Ball Shots 12/9
— 12 Box Jump Over
— 6 Dual Dumbbell Deadlift 32'5/22'5
— 18 cals Row
— - NIVEL INTERMEDIO -
— 6 Hang Squat Clean 52/35
— 18 Wall Ball Shots 9/6
— 12 Box Jump Over
— 6 Dual Dumbbell Deadlift 27'5/17'5
— 16 cals Row
— - NIVEL SCALED -
— 6 Hang Squat Clean 43/30 Kg o 50 %
— 15 Wall Ball Shots 9/6
— 12 Box Jump Over
— 6 Dual Dumbbell Deadlift 22'5/15
— 16 cals Row
Rest 2:30

3 Rounds For Time of Ring Muscle Ups

— Rest 2:1
— - Buscamos tiradas lo más largas posibles.
— - El objetivo es acumular volumen de trabajo de calidad con altos niveles de interferencia muscular.
— - Busca optimizar al máximo, mecanizando un patrón de movimiento.
— - We aim for the longest possible runs.
— - The goal is to accumulate quality work volume with high levels of muscle interference.
— - Aim to optimize as much as possible by mechanizing a movement pattern.

— 10 Ring Muscle Up
— - NIVEL SCALED -

ACCESORY

— RIR 3-2

Rest as needed
E. ENDURANCE
EMOM (6 sets):
20 minute EMOM of Bikes, Shuttle Runs, Dual Dumbbell Hang Power Cleans, and more

  • 45 sec Shuttle Run
  • 3 Dual Dumbbell Hang Power Clean @ 22/15 kg
  • 3 Dual Dumbbell Front Squat @ 22/15 kg
  • 3 Dual Dumbbell Shoulder to Overhead @ 22/15 kg
  • Rest
— - AMRAP on minute 3. Start every amrap where you left it.
— - Ritmo muy fuerte donde sea imposible hablar en la Echo Bike y en ell Amrap de Db.
— - Ritmo lento en el Sky.
— - Nos moveremos entre el 80-100 % FC Max. Rpe 8-9.
— - Very intense pace where it’s impossible to talk during the Echo Bike and DB AMRAP.
— - Slow pace during the Sky.
— - We’ll be working at 80–100% of maximum heart rate (RPE 8–9).

— (2) 45" Shuttle Run
— (3) 22,5/15

@ 50-70 %1RM

— Hang power snatch 90º catch

@ 75-80 %1RM

— - No subamos porcentajes.

— - Focus on technique to improve powerlifting with maximum weights.
— - Let’s not increase the percentage loads.

H. EFFICIENCY - CAPACITY
5 Rounds for Time — Rest 2:30 between rounds

— -2 Sandbag Clean

— - “High-intensity training”: We prioritize using heavier weights and completing the recommended number of repetitions over time, while keeping the movement going.

20 sec

- Si hay una diferencia grande de calorías entre la primera ronda y la última, hacemos "perdida grande de rendimiento". Si hay poca diferencia de calorías entre la primera ronda y la última hacemos "poca potencia"
- Máxima Velocidad de esprint en las series de pocos segundos (Rpe 10). E
- n las series de 30" la primera serie buscamos ir a la misma velocidad que hicimos la primera serie en test. En las demás series el objetivo es acercarnos lo máximo posible a esta primera serie. (Rpe 10)
- If there is a large difference in calories between the first round and the last, we say there is a “significant drop in performance.” If there is little difference in calories between the first round and the last, we say there is “low power.”
- Maximum sprint speed in the short-duration sets (RPE 10).
- In the 30-second sets, the goal for the first set is to maintain the same speed as in the first set of the test. In the remaining sets, the goal is to get as close as possible to the pace of that first set. (RPE 10)

- Si hay una diferencia grande de calorías entre la primera ronda y la última, hacemos "perdida grande de rendimiento". Si hay poca diferencia de calorías entre la primera ronda y la última hacemos "poca potencia"
- Máxima Velocidad de esprint en las series de pocos segundos (Rpe 10). E
- n las series de 30" la primera serie buscamos ir a la misma velocidad que hicimos la primera serie en test. En las demás series el objetivo es acercarnos lo máximo posible a esta primera serie. (Rpe 10)
- If there is a large difference in calories between the first round and the last, we say there is a “significant drop in performance.” If there is little difference in calories between the first round and the last, we say there is “low power.”
- Maximum sprint speed in the short-duration sets (RPE 10).
- In the 30-second sets, the goal for the first set is to maintain the same speed as in the first set of the test. In the remaining sets, the goal is to get as close as possible to the pace of that first set. (RPE 10)

- REST: Walking back the meters done in the series.

B. ACTIVATION
Run 3 x 100 meter intervals
- En los 100 m progresivos buscamos terminar al 90 % de las máxima velocidad.
- Si no estamos acostumbrados a esprintar terminamos fuerte sin llegar a esprint.
- In the 100-meter progressive run, we aim to finish at 90% of our maximum speed.
- If we aren't used to sprinting, we'll finish strong without actually sprinting.
